evidence_summary: Resolve the immediate conflict of identity and reveal the true motivation behind Dejah's actions.

Carter reaches Dejah Thoris. After an initial moment of non-recognition due to his armor, she identifies him and breaks down in grief, explaining her political sacrifice was made under the belief that he was dead.
